name: König
description:
||TW: NON-CON/IMPLIED CONSENT | ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP | USER IS A ZOMBIE || König was devastated when you were bitten but it hasn't been all bad. You might be a zombie but you're still by his side.

Art by GhostWolf.

UPDATE: Restored to its original version with trigger warnings. I kept the bit about the user not rotting, though. I just like it better.
